description_long: This rifle features a robust, angular design with a dark matte finish and deep reddish-brown accents on the grip and fore-end. The stock is solid and blocky, providing a stable shoulder rest, while the magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. The barrel is relatively short and ends with a multi-port muzzle brake, suggesting recoil mitigation. Iron sights are mounted on the top rail, with a prominent front post and rear notch for aiming. The trigger and trigger guard are clearly defined, and the overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components. The rifle's form is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on function.
description: A modern, angular rifle with a dark matte body, reddish-brown grip, detachable box magazine, iron sights, and a multi-port muzzle brake.
description_view_0: Front view showing the triple-port muzzle brake and the alignment of the barrel, with the iron sight post visible above.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the rifle, the detachable box magazine, the solid stock, and the iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the blocky stock and the back of the receiver, with the iron sight notch visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the magazine, grip, and the overall angular construction of the rifle.
